title: Merchants API
description: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.

apis.heading: Create Merchant
apis.description: As a partner, use the Create Merchant API to onboard your sub-merchants for using Surfboard's payment solutions. You can also display products ( terminals, accessories etc. from Surfboard) for your merchants to choose, set product pricing plans for your merchant, display the product catalogue, and pre-select products for your merchants.
apis.important: Merchant applications in test and demo environments are configured for automatic approval.

reqParams.name: country
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code, in uppercase e.g 'SE', 'DK', 'NO'.

reqParams.name: organisation
reqParams.description: Details of the organisation.

reqParams.name: corporateId
reqParams.description: Provide the corporate ID of the respective merchant.

reqParams.name: legalName
reqParams.description: The legal name of the organization. Mandatory for a PF partner.

reqParams.name: mccCode
reqParams.description: Merchant Category Code (MCC) of the organization. Mandatory for a PF partner.

reqParams.name: address
reqParams.description: The address of the organization. Mandatory for a PF partner.

reqParams.name: careOf
reqParams.description: Name of the addressee that is accepting the correspondence for the intended recipient.

reqParams.name: addressLine1
reqParams.description: Address of the organisation.

reqParams.name: addressLine2
reqParams.description: Address of the organisation.

reqParams.name: addressLine3
reqParams.description: Address of the organisation.

reqParams.name: city
reqParams.description: City where the organisation is located.

reqParams.name: countryCode
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the country where the organization is located.

reqParams.name: postalCode
reqParams.description: Postal code of the organisation.

reqParams.name: phoneNumber
reqParams.description: Contact number of the organisation in code and number format.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code identifying the country or region.

reqParams.name: number
reqParams.description: Phone number.

reqParams.name: email
reqParams.description: Email address of the organization. Mandatory for a PF partner.

reqParams.name: multiMerchantId
reqParams.description: The multi merchant ID in case this merchant should belong to a multiMerchant setup.

reqParams.name: controlFields
reqParams.description: These fields allow you to control the behavior of the API by adding additional actions or controlling the default execution path of the API call.

reqParams.name: displayProducts
reqParams.description: Allows the customization of product display for onboarding merchants. Specify a set of Product IDs (e.g. terminals, accessories) to be shown.

reqParams.name: productId
reqParams.description: Represents the product ID of a product selected for delivery to the merchant.

reqParams.name: pricingPlans
reqParams.description: A list of strings specifying the billing plan for a merchant. This allows you to set up a plan based on the monthly price for a terminal and the duration in months. The specific plan details are provided by Surfboard.

reqParams.name: acquirerConfig
reqParams.description: Configuration for acquirer settings. This is mandatory for PF partners and Direct merchants. Now supports structured format with additional fields.

reqParams.name: currency
reqParams.description: Currency code for the acquirer configuration (e.g., 'SEK', 'EUR', 'USD').

reqParams.name: acquirer
reqParams.description: Name of the acquirer (e.g., 'nets', 'swedbank').

reqParams.name: acquirerMID
reqParams.description: Acquirer Merchant ID for transaction processing in structured format.

reqParams.name: showProductCatalogue
reqParams.description: Toggles the visibility of the product catalogue during the Web KYB process. Defaults to false if not specified.

reqParams.name: merchantConfig
reqParams.description: Configuration settings for the merchant.

reqParams.name: settlementFrequency
reqParams.description: Settlement frequency for the merchant payments.

possibleValues.description: Daily settlement
Weekly settlement
Monthly settlement

reqParams.name: serviceProvider
reqParams.description: Array of service provider configurations for the merchant.

reqParams.name: serviceProviderId
reqParams.description: Unique identifier of the service provider.

reqParams.name: deductApplicableTransactionFee
reqParams.description: Whether to deduct applicable transaction fees.

reqParams.name: amount
reqParams.description: Fee structure for the service provider.

reqParams.name: percentage
reqParams.description: Percentage-based fee.

reqParams.name: fixed
reqParams.description: Fixed fee amount.

reqParams.name: adjustmentTypes
reqParams.description: Array of adjustment types for the fee structure.

reqParams.name: transactionPricingPlan
reqParams.description: Specifies the billing plan based on which transaction cost is calculated for a merchant. If more than one billing plan exists it is mandatory to send in this value.

reqParams.name: paymentMethods
reqParams.description: Configuration for payment methods to be enabled for the merchant.

reqParams.name: card
reqParams.description: Card payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for card payments.

reqParams.name: mId
reqParams.description: Merchant ID for card payments.

reqParams.name: scheme
reqParams.description: Array of supported card schemes.

possibleValues.description: Visa card scheme
Mastercard scheme

reqParams.name: amex
reqParams.description: American Express payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: mId
reqParams.description: American Express Merchant ID. Required when configuring AMEX payment method.

reqParams.name: swish
reqParams.description: Swedish mobile payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for Swish payments.

reqParams.name: swishNumber
reqParams.description: Optional Swish number for the payment method configuration.

reqParams.name: klarna
reqParams.description: Buy now, pay later payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for Klarna payments.

reqParams.name: mId
reqParams.description: Klarna Merchant ID for the payment method configuration.

reqParams.name: klarnaPricingPlan
reqParams.description: Klarna pricing plan configuration.

reqParams.name: username
reqParams.description: Klarna account username. Required when configuring KLARNA payment method.

reqParams.name: password
reqParams.description: Klarna account password. Required when configuring KLARNA payment method.

reqParams.name: b2binv
reqParams.description: B2B invoice payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for B2B invoice payments.

reqParams.name: clientId
reqParams.description: Client ID for B2B invoice payment method.

reqParams.name: clientSecretKey
reqParams.description: Client secret key for B2B invoice payment method.

reqParams.name: acc2acc
reqParams.description: Account to account transfer payment method configuration. Can be a boolean to enable/disable or an object with specific settings.

reqParams.name: billingPlan
reqParams.description: Billing plan for account-to-account payments.

reqParams.name: mId
reqParams.description: Merchant ID for account to account transfers.

reqParams.name: vipps
reqParams.description: Norwegian mobile payment method. Set to true to enable Vipps payment method.

reqParams.name: mobilepay
reqParams.description: Danish mobile payment method. Set to true to enable MobilePay payment method.

reqParams.name: preSelectProducts
reqParams.description: A set of products that are pre-selected by you for the merchant. These products are shipped as part of the onboarding process without further input from the merchant.

reqParams.name: productId
reqParams.description: Represents the product ID of a product selected for delivery to the merchant.

reqParams.name: quantity
reqParams.description: Quantity of the product

reqParams.name: pricingPlanId
reqParams.description: Specifies the billing plan for a merchant. This allows you to set up a plan based on the monthly price for a terminal and the duration in months. The specific plan details are provided by Surfboard.

reqParams.name: redirectUrl
reqParams.description: This will be the redirect URL from the web kyb page, once the application is submitted the user can choose to redirect to the provided URL.

reqParams.name: generateShortLink
reqParams.description: Set as true when you need the short URL for the web kyb page. Default is set to false.

reqParams.name: store
reqParams.description: Input the store details if you also want to create a store for the merchant.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Name of the store.

reqParams.name: email

reqParams.name: phoneNumber
reqParams.description: Contact number of the store in code and number format.

reqParams.name: code
reqParams.description: International dialing code identifying the country or region.

reqParams.name: number

reqParams.name: address
reqParams.description: The address of the store.

reqParams.name: careOf
reqParams.description: Name of the addressee that is accepting the correspondence for the intended recipient.

reqParams.name: addressLine1
reqParams.description: Address of the store.

reqParams.name: addressLine2
reqParams.description: Address of the store.

reqParams.name: addressLine3
reqParams.description: Address of the store.

reqParams.name: city

reqParams.name: countryCode
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the country where the store is located.

reqParams.name: postalCode

reqParams.name: onlineInfo
reqParams.description: In order to start accepting online payments you need to create an online store which requires some additional properties such as the following.

reqParams.name: merchantWebshopURL
reqParams.description: This is the web-shop URL of the merchant.

reqParams.name: paymentPageHostURL
reqParams.description: This is the URL of the payment page. This is required for integrating online payments using SDK mode.

reqParams.name: termsAndConditionsURL
reqParams.description: This is the URL of the T&C of the merchant’s web-shop, it has to contain the refund policy.

reqParams.name: privacyPolicyURL
reqParams.description: This is the URL of the privacy policy of the merchant.

reqParams.name: googlePayMerchantId
reqParams.description: This is the Google Pay merchant ID of the merchant.

reqParams.name: preEnteredInformation
reqParams.description: Use this param to pre fill the merchant application

reqParams.name: openingInfo
reqParams.description: These details helps us understand when payments are accepted for the merchant.

reqParams.name: isSeasonalOpen
reqParams.description: If they are a seasonal merchant, open only on select seasons.

reqParams.name: monthsOpen
reqParams.description: If they are a seasonal merchant, mention the months they will be open for payments. e.g., Seasonal shops open only during january and map can be mentioned as [1,5]

reqParams.name: isOpenAllYear
reqParams.description: If merchant will be accepting payments all year round.

reqParams.name: isStoreOpenAtNight
reqParams.description: Mention if merchant stores are open all night.

reqParams.name: reasonForOpeningAtNight
reqParams.description: Provide a reason as to why they are open all night. Mandatory when 'isStoreOpenAtNight' is set to true.

reqParams.name: giftcards
reqParams.description: Gift card details of the merchant if any.

reqParams.name: amountPerYear
reqParams.description: Estimated amount spent using gift cards per year.

reqParams.name: averageValidDays
reqParams.description: Average validity of gift card provided by merchant.

reqParams.name: prePayments
reqParams.description: Details of pre payment option provided by merchant

reqParams.name: averageDeliveryTimeInDays
reqParams.description: Average delivery time in days taken after pre payment.

reqParams.name: salesPercentPerYear
reqParams.description: Percentage of sales revenue generated via pre payment.

reqParams.name: fundsInfo
reqParams.description: Sales information with respect to the merchant.

reqParams.name: estimatedAmountPerYear
reqParams.description: Estimated amount of sales per year.

reqParams.name: priceOfMostExpensiveItemSold
reqParams.description: Price of most expensive item.

reqParams.name: averageTransactionValuePerDay
reqParams.description: Estimated amount of sales per day.

reqParams.name: estimatedAmountPerTransaction
reqParams.description: Average amount per transaction.

reqParams.name: estimatedFrequencyOfTransactions
reqParams.description: Denotes how often transactions are made under merchant. Possible values are 'DAILY', 'WEEKLY', 'MONTHLY', 'YEARLY'

reqParams.name: estimatedNoOfDailyTransactions
reqParams.description: Average number of sales per day. Mandatory when 'estimatedFrequencyOfTransactions' is set to 'DAILY'

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request 'SUCCESS' | 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: This is the applicationId that you will use to track the status of the create merchant request.

resParams.name: webKybUrl
resParams.description: This is the link for the KYC session created for the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: For PF partners, merchant is created and the merchantId is returned.

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: For PF partners, store is created and the storeId is returned.

resParams.name: shortLinkUrl
resParams.description: Short URL of the web kyb page if generateShortLink is set to true.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Check Application Status
apis.description: Retrieves the status of the merchant onboarding. After initiating the onboarding for the sub-merchant, use the Check Application Status API to get updates regarding the application’s progress. After the merchant is created, the Merchant ID and Store ID are also available through the webhook.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: The Application ID of the respective merchant returned by the Create Merchant API.

resParams.name: webKybUrl
resParams.description: This is the link for the KYC session created for the merchant, which can be fetched for applications in state 'APPLICATION_INITIATED' or 'APPLICATION_PENDING_INFORMATION'. This URL will be returned for ISV(Independent Software Vendors) partners only.

resParams.name: applicationStatus
resParams.description: Describes the status of the application. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: The application has been created, and the Web KYB URL has been generated. The merchant is now required to fill in necessary information through the Web KYB.
The merchant has started filling in the Web KYB form but has not yet submitted it.
The merchant has finished filling in the Web KYB and submitted it for processing.
The application is still under processing, and additional data is required from the merchant.
Both the merchant signatories and UBOs have signed the application.
The application has been processed and rejected.
The application has been processed and accepted. It is now pending merchant creation and onboarding.
Each application is valid for 30 days. If there is no action during these 30 days, the KYB is treated as session expired.
The merchant account has been created. At this stage, the Merchant ID and Store ID will be returned in the status call.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Merchant ID of the created merchant is returned when application status is 'MERCHANT_CREATED'

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: Store ID of the store created under the merchant is returned when application status is 'MERCHANT_CREATED'

resParams.name: billingPlans
resParams.description: Array of billing plans associated with the merchant application.

resParams.name: onlineOnboardingStatus
resParams.description: Status of the online onboarding process for the merchant. Can be null if not applicable.

resParams.name: paymentMethods
resParams.description: Array of payment methods configured for the merchant.

resParams.name: acquirerOnboarding
resParams.description: Acquirer onboarding details for the merchant. Can be null if not applicable.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Create Multi-merchant Group
apis.description: Creates a multi-merchant group. Partners can use this API to create a multi-merchant group that enables multiple merchants to use the same terminal. Individual merchants are tagged to this group, enabling access to all the terminals registered in this group.

reqParams.name: country
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code, in uppercase e.g 'SE', 'DK', 'NO'.

reqParams.name: zipCode
reqParams.description: ZIP code of the store address.

reqParams.name: name
reqParams.description: Name of the Multi-merchant group.

reqParams.name: email
reqParams.description: Email address of the Multi-merchant group.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request 'SUCCESS' | 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: This is the applicationId that you will use to track the status of the create multi-merchant group request.

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Multi-merchant ID.

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: Multi-merchant store ID.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch All Merchant Applications
apis.description: Retrieves a list of all merchants applications with a specific partner.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: The Application ID used to uniquely identify a merchant's application.

resParams.name: applicationStatus
resParams.description: Describes the status of the application. The possible values are:

possibleValues.description: The application has been created, and the Web KYB URL has been generated. The merchant is now required to fill in necessary information through the Web KYB.
The merchant has finished filling in the Web KYB and submitted it for processing.
The application is still under processing, and additional data is required from the merchant.
Both the merchant signatories and UBOs have signed the application.
The application has been processed and rejected.
The application has been processed and accepted. It is now pending merchant creation and onboarding.
The merchant account has been created. At this stage, the Merchant ID and Store ID will be returned in the status call.

resParams.name: corporateId
resParams.description: Corporate ID of the respective merchant.

resParams.name: country
resParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the primary location of the merchant.

resParams.name: createdAt
resParams.description: Date of application creation in ISO string format

resParams.name: lastUpdatedAt
resParams.description: Date of last updation recorded with the merchant application in ISO string format

resParams.name: webKybUrl
resParams.description: The Web KYB URL generated for the application.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Merchant Details
apis.description: Retrieves information for a specific merchant. As a partner you can use this API to get information regarding your sub-merchants

resParams.name: data

resParams.name: partnerId

resParams.name: countryCode

resParams.description: Name of the addressee that is accepting the correspondence for the intended recipient.

resParams.description: Address of the merchant.

resParams.name: addressLine3
resParams.description: Address of the merchant.

resParams.name: city
resParams.description: City where the merchant is located.

resParams.name: countryCode
resParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the location of the merchant.

resParams.name: postalCode

resParams.description: Timestamp at which the merchant was created.

resParams.name: totalNumberOfTransaction
resParams.description: Total number of transactions performed by the merchant.

resParams.name: totalAmountOfTransaction

apis.heading: Fetch All Merchant Terminals
apis.query: To query terminals by terminal type, send in terminalType as query param.
apis.description: Retrieves a list of all terminals associated with a specific merchant. You can use this API to get information regarding all the terminals registered under a merchant.

reqParams.name: terminalType
reqParams.description: Optional query param to filter terminals by terminal type.

possibleValues.description: Hardware terminal with a physical keypad.
Android terminal with custom payment apps, digital receipts etc.
Android terminal with a built-in printer.
Complete checkout solution with a customer facing screen.
Software checkout solution for NFC-enabled Android devices to accept contactless card payments.
Surfboard-hosted payment page where all UI and configurations are managed by Surfboard.
Merchant-hosted payment page where Surfboard renders payment fields within the merchant’s environment.
Used for Merchant Initiated Transactions (MIT), allowing payments to be triggered by the merchant without customer interaction.
Standalone printing device.
Surfboard Android based test terminal used during integrations.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: terminalId
resParams.description: Terminal ID of the terminal.

resParams.name: terminalType
resParams.description: Describes the type of the terminal.

possibleValues.description: Hardware terminal with a physical keypad.
Android terminal with custom payment apps, digital receipts etc.
Android terminal with a built-in printer.
Complete checkout solution with a customer facing screen.
Software checkout solution for NFC-enabled Android devices to accept contactless card payments.
Surfboard-hosted payment page where all UI and configurations are managed by Surfboard.
Merchant-hosted payment page where Surfboard renders payment fields within the merchant’s environment.
Used for Merchant Initiated Transactions (MIT), allowing payments to be triggered by the merchant without customer interaction.
Standalone printing device.
Surfboard Android based test terminal used during integrations.

resParams.name: softwareVersion
resParams.description: Software version of the terminal.

resParams.name: osType
resParams.description: Describes the type of Operating System(OS) running on the terminal.

possibleValues.description: Android operating system.
Apple's operating system for iPhones.
Surfboard firmware.

resParams.name: osVersion
resParams.description: Operating System(OS) version of the terminal.

resParams.name: deviceVendor
resParams.description: Device vendor of the terminal.

resParams.name: deviceModel
resParams.description: Device model of the terminal.

resParams.name: serialNo
resParams.description: Serial number of the terminal.

resParams.name: storeId
resParams.description: The Store ID of the store under which the terminal is registered.

resParams.name: linkedTerminalId
resParams.description: The Terminal ID of another terminal to which the current terminal is linked.

resParams.name: terminalStatus
resParams.description: Status of the terminal, it can be in one of these states: REGISTERED | ACTIVE | IN_ACTIVE | DE_REGISTERED.

resParams.name: terminalPaymentMethods
resParams.description: Payment methods supported by the terminal.

resParams.name: startDate
resParams.description: Timestamp at which the merchant was created.

resParams.name: terminalName
resParams.description: Name of the terminal used as a reference for users.

resParams.name: terminalPublicKey
resParams.description: Public key used while initializing SelfHostedPage Online Terminal (Online SDK)

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch All Merchants
apis.description: Retrieves a list of all merchants associated with a specific partner. Partners can use this API to get information regarding all their sub-merchants.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: merchantId
resParams.description: Merchant ID of the merchant.

resParams.name: partnerId
resParams.description: The Partner ID of the partner with whom the merchant is affiliated.

resParams.name: merchantName
resParams.description: Name of the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantLanguage
resParams.description: Preferred language selected by the merchant.

resParams.name: merchantLogoUrl
resParams.description: Merchant logo URL.

resParams.name: email
resParams.description: Email address of the merchant.

resParams.name: companyId
resParams.description: Company ID of the merchant.

resParams.name: countryCode
resParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the primary location of the merchant.

resParams.name: mccCode
resParams.description: Merchant Category Code (MCC) of the merchant.

resParams.name: address
resParams.description: Physical address of the merchant.

resParams.name: careOf
resParams.description: Name of the addressee that is accepting the correspondence for the intended recipient.

resParams.name: addressLine1
resParams.description: Address of the merchant.

resParams.name: addressLine2
resParams.description: Address of the merchant.

resParams.name: addressLine3
resParams.description: Address of the merchant.

resParams.name: city
resParams.description: City where the merchant is located.

resParams.name: countryCode
resParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code in uppercase, representing the location of the merchant.

resParams.name: postalCode
resParams.description: Postal code of the merchant.

resParams.name: createdAt
resParams.description: Timestamp at which the merchant was created.

resParams.name: totalNumberOfTransaction
resParams.description: The total number of transactions performed.

resParams.name: totalAmountOfTransaction
resParams.description: The total amount of money involved in all transactions.

resParams.name: lastTransactionAt
resParams.description: The timestamp of the last transaction in ISO format.

resParams.name: phoneNumber
resParams.description: The contact phone number related to the merchant.

resParams.name: currencyCode
resParams.description: Three-digit ISO currency code, representing the supported currency for the merchant. Can be any one of the following: ‘208’ | ‘978’ | ‘752’.

resParams.name: acquirerMID
resParams.description: Denotes the Acquirer MID for onboarding merchants through payment institution partners(PF or Acquirer).

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch All Merchant Contracts
apis.description: Retrieves the list all contracts under the specific merchant.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data

resParams.name: contractId
resParams.description: The contract ID used to identify a contract.

resParams.name: type
resParams.description: Denotes type of the merchant contract.

possibleValues.description: A contract that establishes relationship and services agreed between two parties.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Denotes the status of the merchant contract. It can be either 'ACTIVE' or 'INACTIVE'

resParams.name: contractLink
resParams.description: Link for the merchant contract.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Activate Terminal
apis.description: This API is available for partners who manage their own storage and terminal delivery solution and requires a PCI compliant storage setup. The API can be used to activate terminals that are tagged to you as a partner. This API will return an error if the entered serial number is not available to you.

reqParams.name: serialNo
reqParams.description: Serial No of the terminal. For the SurfPad, you need to use the serial number from the back of the device. With SurfTouch, go to Settings -> Scroll down to 'About phone' -> Serial Number

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the terminal activation.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the activate terminal request.

apis.heading: Fetch Transaction Analytics
apis.query: To filter analytics by date range, send in startDate and endDate as query params. You can also use additional query parameters like storeId, terminalId, orderType, etc. Grouping the results can be controlled via the groupBy object in the query.
apis.description: Retrieves aggregated transaction analytics for a specific merchant. This can include analytics by store, terminal, date range, card brand, and more.

reqParams.name: storeId
reqParams.description: Provide store ID to filter analytics for a specific store.

reqParams.name: terminalId
reqParams.description: Provide terminal ID to filter analytics for a specific terminal.

reqParams.name: startDate
reqParams.description: Start of the date range in yyyy-mm-dd format.

reqParams.name: endDate
reqParams.description: End of the date range in yyyy-mm-dd format.

reqParams.name: orderType
reqParams.description: Type of order to filter by. Possible values are 'purchase' and 'return'.

reqParams.name: terminalType
reqParams.description: Type of terminal to filter results.

possibleValues.description: Hardware terminal with a physical keypad.
Android terminal with custom payment apps, digital receipts etc.
Android terminal with a built-in printer.
Complete checkout solution with a customer facing screen.
Software checkout solution for NFC-enabled Android devices to accept contactless card payments.
SoftPOS solution on COTS devices.
In this mode, the payment page and all associated configuration is managed by Surfboard.
With SelfHostedPage, Surfboard renders the fields in your page.
Set this type if you want to accept Merchant Initiated Transactions (MIT).

reqParams.name: paymentMethod
reqParams.description: Payment method to filter analytics.

reqParams.name: posEntryMode
reqParams.description: POS entry mode to filter by.

reqParams.name: cardBrand
reqParams.description: Card brand to filter by.

reqParams.name: currency
reqParams.description: Three digit numeric or ISO code representing currency.

reqParams.name: groupBy
reqParams.description: Use this object to group analytics by store, terminal, etc. For example, groupBy[storeId]=true.

reqParams.name: storeId
reqParams.description: Set to true to group results by store.

reqParams.name: terminalId
reqParams.description: Set to true to group results by terminalId.

reqParams.name: orderType
reqParams.description: Set to true to group results by orderType.

reqParams.name: terminalType
reqParams.description: Set to true to group results by terminalType.

reqParams.name: paymentMethod
reqParams.description: Set to true to group results by paymentMethod.

reqParams.name: cardBrand
reqParams.description: Set to true to group results by cardBrand.

reqParams.name: posEntryMode
reqParams.description: Set to true to group results by posEntryMode.

reqParams.name: timeSegments
reqParams.description: Segments the analytics by time. Possible values are 'DAILY', 'WEEKLY', 'MONTHLY', 'QUARTERLY', 'YEARLY'.for example groupBy[timeSegments]=DAILY.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: An array of analytics objects, each containing aggregated transaction information.

resParams.name: currency
resParams.description: The currency code for the transactions, typically a three-digit numeric code.

resParams.name: terminalId
resParams.description: The terminal ID from which the transactions were made.

resParams.name: terminalType
resParams.description: Specifies the type of terminal.

resParams.name: orderType
resParams.description: The type of order.

resParams.name: paymentMethod
resParams.description: The payment method used.

resParams.name: cardBrand
resParams.description: The brand of the card, if paymentMethod is 'CARD'. This may be empty if no card brand applies.

resParams.name: timeSegments
resParams.description: The date/time segment in which these transactions occurred.

resParams.name: orderTransactionCount
resParams.description: Number of transactions that match this grouping or filter.

resParams.name: totalTransactionAmount
resParams.description: Aggregate sum of transaction amounts (in minor currency units) for this group.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the status or outcome of the request.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message describing the status or outcome of the request.
